a:T27fb,<div class="specification">
<p>The amount of yeast, <em>g</em> grams, in a sugar solution can be modelled by the function,</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><em>g</em>(<em>t</em>) = 10 − <em>k</em>(<em>c</em><sup>−<em>t</em></sup>) for <em>t</em> ≥ 0</p>
<p>where <em>t</em> is the time in minutes.</p>
<p>The graph of <em>g</em>(<em>t</em>) is shown.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">The initial amount of yeast in this solution is 2 grams.</p>
</div><div class="specification">
<p>The amount of yeast in this solution after 3 minutes is 9 grams.</p>
</div><div class="question">
<p>Write down the maximum amount of yeast in this solution.</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/maths/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","maths"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.1.SL.TZ0.T_15"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"maths"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"AI"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","sl-2-5-modelling-functions"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>10 (grams)       <em><strong>(A1) (C1)</strong></em></p>\n<p><em><strong>[1 mark]</strong></em></p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
